metadata.description: Two-plugin framework for institutional buy-side single-name US equity research. Plugin one (us-equity-research) orchestrates a multi-agent fundamental research workflow producing IC memos and structured JSON outputs. Plugin two (us-equity-ic-rigor) layers a 20-gate PM red-team verification stack on top of that output. Composes with claude-for-financial-services for Excel DCF / Excel comps / polished DOCX delegation.

plugins.name: us-equity-research
plugins.description: Multi-agent orchestrator for buy-side fundamental research on US equities. Phase 0 (setup) → Phase 1 (5 parallel discovery specialists, FS-Banks Augmentation when sector=Banks) → Phase 2 (6 deepening specialists including A-Consensus for variance identification) → Phase 3 (4 valuation specialists) → manifest generation → verification → IC memo assembly. EDGAR-only default mode; premium hooks (Visible Alpha, Capital IQ, AlphaSense, Bloomberg) opt-in.

plugins.name: us-equity-ic-rigor
plugins.description: PM red-team rigor layer for IC memo verification. 20 gates G1-G20: math (G1/G3/G4/G5), source discipline (G6/G7/G11), structure (G8/G9/G10), quant overlay (G13/G14/G18), bank discipline (G16), consensus variance (G15), revision velocity (G17), provenance manifest with file-hash integrity (G19), view defensibility with R-v2 attack survival (G20). Score-band rubric 6.0-9.0+ with explicit caps on math/discipline failures. Composes with us-equity-research.
